element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns park layout, talks to NPCs to unlock stage access
Answer Disney questions correctly to reveal final key location
Defeat ghosts by throwing candles; basic projectile mechanic
Rescue villagers from pirates; navigate enemy placement
Race against Panhandle Pete; avoid obstacles while driving
Control train on fixed track; choose correct paths, avoid hazards
Pilot spaceship through asteroids; shoot enemy ships with phaser

typical_relief_triggers: Returning to safe overworld hub between stages
typical_tension_triggers: Pirate encounters in Pirates of the Caribbean
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Multi-stage anthology structure with player-driven pacing; overworld hub provides breathing room between action-focused mini-games

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: NPC positioning in overworld; children scattered throughout park indicate optional trivia questions available at any time
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden locations of keys revealed through NPC dialogue and trivia answers

difficulty_curve.early_game: Easy navigation and simple trivia; initial stages feature basic enemy patterns (side-scrolling ghosts/pirates with straightforward attacks)
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Vehicle control stages introduce precision requirements; top-down Autopia requires racing skills; rail-based Big Thunder Mountain demands correct path selection
difficulty_curve.late_game: Space Mountain first-person shooting is most mechanically complex; combined asteroid avoidance and enemy targeting demands sustained focus
notable_spikes: Transition from overworld hub to any action stage (safe to dangerous context shift)
Space Mountain stage significantly raises mechanical complexity from prior stages

notable_level_patterns.description: Central overworld Disney park allows player to select from 5 distinct stage types in any order; each stage is a self-contained mini-game with different mechanics and perspective (side-scroll, top-down, first-person)
Each stage completion yields one silver key; sixth key obtained through trivia mastery; central goal of unlocking Cinderella Castle gate drives progression
Five stages employ distinct control schemes (projectile combat, platforming navigation, racing, rail-based vehicle control, first-person shooting) to prevent monotony
Dialogue-based quiz system available throughout overworld; provides alternative progression path and knowledge-based reward outside action gameplay
